quality_assessment.mechanical_impact_summary: Passive, long-term longevity enhancement that slows the aging process for the Druid.

mechanics_review.effect: For every 10 years that pass, the character ages only 1 year (1/10th normal aging rate).
mechanics_review.balance_assessment: Appropriate for a high-level (18th) class feature. It offers flavor and roleplaying utility but negligible impact on combat mechanics or immediate power level.
potential_ambiguities: Does not specify if this halts aging completely at some point, only that it slows it down.
